/usr/bin/ar qc ../../archive_output_directory/libgunit_large.a CMakeFiles/gunit_large.dir/benchmark.cc.o CMakeFiles/gunit_large.dir/gunit_test_main_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/gunit_large.dir/test_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/gunit_large.dir/thread_utils.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../archive_output_directory/libgunit_large.a
